**CDL-A Driver - Columbus, OH - $1,400-$1,700/week**

Join our team at XYZ Logistics, a leading provider of transportation solutions in the Midwest. We pride ourselves on our commitment to safety and reliability, ensuring our drivers have the support they need to succeed.

**Requirements:**
- Must have a valid Class A CDL
- At least 1 year of OTR or regional driving experience
- Clean Motor Vehicle Record (no DUI in the last 7 years)
- Current DOT medical card

**Nice to Have:**
- Experience with dedicated routes
- Familiarity with ELDs and electronic logging
- Strong communication skills

**Schedule Details:**
- Regional dedicated route
- Home weekly
- Consistent miles with a focus on driver safety and satisfaction.
